Class GuestWaitingListController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.GuestWaitingListController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AvailableTimesListener
public class GuestWaitingListController extends BaseDisplayController implements AvailableTimesListener
Controller for the guest waiting list UI. Handles adding guests to the waiting list, removing them, and displaying available times.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up the date picker, listeners for number of diners, and registers this controller as the active display controller.

    • loadTimesForDate

      private void loadTimesForDate(LocalDate date)
      Loads available times for a specific date and number of guests.
      Parameters:
      date - the selected date

    • loadTimes

      public void loadTimes(List<LocalTime> times)
      Loads a list of available times into the timeComboBox.
      Parameters:
      times - a list of available LocalTime objects

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List<Reservation> reservations)
      Description copied from class: BaseDisplayController
      Called when a list of reservations is received. Implementing classes should define how the reservations are displayed.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      reservations - a list of Reservation objects to be displayed

    • ontakeplace

      private void ontakeplace()
      Handles adding a guest to the waiting list. Validates input fields and sends the request to the client handler.

    • onRemoveFromWaitingList

      private void onRemoveFromWaitingList()
      Handles removing a guest from the waiting list using a confirmation code.

    • clearAddFields

      public void clearAddFields()
      Clears the input fields for adding a guest.

    • clearConfirmationCodeField

      public void clearConfirmationCodeField()
      Clears the confirmation code field.

    • getConfirmationCodeField

      public javafx.scene.control.TextField getConfirmationCodeField()
      Returns the confirmation code TextField.
      Returns:
      the TextField for confirmation code

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the main menu UI.

    • isEmail

      private boolean isEmail(String input)
      Simple check to see if input is an email.
      Parameters:
      input - the input string
      Returns:
      true if it contains "@", false otherwise

    • isPhoneNumber

      private boolean isPhoneNumber(String input)
      Simple check to see if input is a phone number.
      Parameters:
      input - the input string
      Returns:
      true if it contains only digits (and optional +), false otherwise

    • showAlert

      private void showAlert(String title, String message)
      Shows an alert dialog with the given title and message.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the alert
      message - the message content

    • updateAvailableTimes

      public void updateAvailableTimes(List<LocalTime> times)
      Called when available times are updated by the client.
      Specified by:
      updateAvailableTimes in interface AvailableTimesListener
      Parameters:
      times - list of available LocalTime objects
